Title: Successful order placement as a logged-in user
Preconditions: User is logged in; cart has at least one item with available stock
Steps: 1. Navigate to /products and add one or more items to the cart | 2. Navigate to /checkout | 3. Fill in Full Name, Email, Address, City, Zip Code, and Phone with valid data | 4. Click Place Order
Expected Result: Order is submitted; success alert displays with an Order ID; user is redirected to /; cart is cleared

Title: Successful order placement as a guest (no token)
Preconditions: User is NOT logged in; cart has at least one item
Steps: 1. Without logging in, add items to the cart | 2. Navigate to /checkout | 3. Fill in all fields with valid data | 4. Click Place Order
Expected Result: Order is submitted without an Authorization header; success alert with Order ID appears; cart clears; user is redirected to /

Title: Empty cart redirect
Steps: 1. Navigate directly to /checkout with an empty cart
Expected Result: Page shows Your cart is empty message and a Continue Shopping button; no checkout form is visible

Title: Continue Shopping button navigates to products
Preconditions: Cart is empty; user is on the empty-cart view of /checkout
Steps: 1. Navigate to /checkout with an empty cart | 2. Click Continue Shopping

Title: Form submission blocked when required fields are missing
Preconditions: Cart has at least one item
Steps: 1. Navigate to /checkout | 2. Leave one or more required fields blank (e.g. clear the Name field) | 3. Click Place Order
Expected Result: Browser native validation prevents submission; no API call is made; an inline validation message appears on the empty field

Title: Invalid email format is rejected
Preconditions: Cart has at least one item
Steps: 1. Navigate to /checkout | 2. Fill in all fields but enter notanemail in the Email field | 3. Click Place Order
Expected Result: Browser native email validation fires; form is not submitted; user sees a validation error on the Email field

Title: Stock adjustment error — server returns adjusted quantities
Preconditions: Cart contains an item with quantity higher than current stock (simulate via API or DB manipulation); user is on /checkout
Steps: 1. Navigate to /checkout with an overstocked item in cart | 2. Fill in all fields with valid data | 3. Click Place Order
Expected Result: Server returns adjustedItems in the response; cart quantities are updated to reflect available stock; error messages are displayed above the form; form remains visible so the user can retry

Title: Generic server error (non-OK response no adjustedItems)
Preconditions: Cart has at least one item; server is configured to return a non-2xx error without adjustedItems
Steps: 1. Navigate to /checkout | 2. Fill in all fields with valid data | 3. Click Place Order
Expected Result: Error message from responseData.errors or responseData.error is displayed; cart is NOT cleared; user can retry

Title: Network failure during order submission
Preconditions: Cart has at least one item; simulate network failure (e.g. disable network in browser DevTools before submitting)
Steps: 1. Navigate to /checkout | 2. Fill in all fields with valid data | 3. Disable network connectivity in browser DevTools | 4. Click Place Order
Expected Result: An error occurred. Please try again. message is shown; loading state is cleared; cart is NOT cleared

Title: Loading state during submission
Preconditions: Cart has at least one item; network is slow or throttled (use DevTools Network throttling)
Steps: 1. Navigate to /checkout | 2. Fill in all fields with valid data | 3. Click Place Order | 4. Observe the button immediately after clicking
Expected Result: Button text changes to Placing Order... and is disabled; no duplicate submissions are possible

Title: Order summary displays correct items and total
Preconditions: Cart has two or more different items with known prices and quantities
Steps: 1. Add Item A (e.g. 2x $10.00) and Item B (e.g. 1x $5.99) to the cart | 2. Navigate to /checkout | 3. Inspect the Order Summary section
Expected Result: Each item shows its image, name, quantity, and line total (price x quantity); the grand total matches the sum of all line totals (e.g. $25.99)

Title: Previous error messages are cleared on retry
Preconditions: Cart has at least one item; a failed submission has already shown error messages
Steps: 1. Trigger an error (e.g. disconnect network and submit) | 2. Re-enable network | 3. Click Place Order again
Expected Result: Error messages from the previous attempt disappear immediately when the new submission starts; new result (success or error) is shown after the request completes
